title: Plastic+
description: A brightly coloured, simplistic texture pack. Ported from Legacy Console edition to work on Java Edition.
body:
Fullpack from 1.0.0 to 1.21.X will take time.

# About:

Plastic+ is a continuation of the Legacy Console Edition Plastic texture pack, preserving its original simplistic design and bright colours. 

This pack adds plastic-themed textures to blocks, items, entities and the UI.

_Originally created by 4J for the Legacy Console edition._

**How to install:**
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
On Modrinth App simply click the "Install" or "Add to an instance" button.

For Minecraft 1.5.2 and below:
1. Download Plastic+
2. Go to %appdata% 
3. Copy .zip to /Roaming/.minecraft/texturepacks
4. Launch Minecraft and select Plastic+

For Minecraft 1.6.1 and above:
1. Download Plastic+
2. Go to %appdata% 
3. Copy .zip to /Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks
4. Launch Minecraft and select Plastic+
  
**Mods supported::**
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
N/A

## FAQ:
**Can I use this in a video/modpack?**

Yes just credit me.

**Any issues?**

Let us know in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/EaFmMmy884)


### **NOTE: This pack is still being updated (I forgot about it but im back). So be sure to download the latest version for bug fixes.**
